data.description: IDC Woodcraft "THE BEAST" 1/4" Roughing Upcut

expressions.tool_comment: 'If you’re tired of spending hours while you wait on your CNC router to remove material from your CNC woodworking projects, then you’ve come to the right bit.  Welcome to the aptly nicknamed "BEAST", a 1/4" hyper-speed CNC router bit from IDC Woodcraft, the ultimate solution for lightning-fast material removal.'
